calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2014 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up; Index
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Cross J. Creason, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, SAFEWAY INC.,
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) VINCENT McCLENDON.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejudice.
Maida Kuduzovic sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Good cause exists for adopting the essential terms of the Court's February 11, 2013 Preliminay Injunction and making them permanent for purposes of judgment, but limited as to San Francisco County only.
IT IS HEREBY ORDERED, DECREED AND ADJUDGED THAT, Defendant VINCENT McCLENDON is permanently enjoined and restrained from entering, shopping at, sitting at, standing upon or otherwise using any Safeway premises in SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, California, including the privately owned walkway directly in front of the store buildings, all store entrances and privately owned parking lots for any purpose whatsoever.
This injunction is subject to the Court's power to modify or dissolve as may be required by the interests of justice.
Defendant is ordered to pay Safeway its court costs in the amount of $435.00
Counsel for Plaintiff to prepare judgment with the modifications read by the court on the record.
Counsel to submit proposed judgment within five days.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2014 Continued To Apr-15-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Cross Creason, Esq. for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to APR-15-2014 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-14-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Continued To Oct-16-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Order To Show Cause And Plaintiff'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: BROOKE PURCELL, ESQ., 415.397.2700, FOR PLAINTIFF SAFEWAY INC.; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling: Order To Show Cause RE: Preliminary Injunction IS Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
